datasets.name: org_kpi_latest
queryLines: SELECT overall_score, completeness_score, accuracy_score, validity_score, consistency_score, uniqueness_score, timeliness_score, tables_below_threshold, pct_assets_monitored, total_tables, total_domains FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest

datasets.name: domain_scores_latest
queryLines: SELECT domain_name, overall_score, completeness_score, accuracy_score, validity_score, consistency_score, uniqueness_score, timeliness_score, tables_below_threshold FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_scores_latest ORDER BY overall_score ASC

datasets.name: org_trend_30d
queryLines: SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp

datasets.name: top10_egregious
queryLines: SELECT table_name, domain_name, catalog_name, overall_score, egregious_count FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ORDER BY overall_score ASC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: tables_below_thresh
queryLines: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest WHERE overall_score < effective_threshold_min

datasets.name: pct_monitored
queryLines: SELECT pct_assets_monitored FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest

datasets.name: domain_detail
queryLines: SELECT d.domain_name, cs.catalog_name, ROUND(AVG(ts.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score, SUM(ts.rules_failed) AS total_failures, SUM(ts.egregious_count) AS egregious_count FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON ts.domain_id = d.domain_id GROUP BY d.domain_name, cs.catalog_name

datasets.name: domain_trend
queryLines: SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, dst.overall_score, dst.completeness_score, dst.accuracy_score, dst.validity_score, dst.consistency_score, dst.uniqueness_score, dst.timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp

datasets.name: domain_critical_tables
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, s.schema_name, ts.overall_score, ts.rules_failed, d.domain_name FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.schema s ON ts.schema_id = s.schema_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON ts.domain_id = d.domain_id WHERE t.is_critical = true AND ts.overall_score < ts.effective_threshold_warning ORDER BY ts.overall_score ASC

datasets.name: domain_rule_passfail
queryLines: SELECT d.domain_name, SUM(CASE WHEN crr.passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN NOT crr.passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_count, COUNT(*) AS total_rules FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON t.domain_id = d.domain_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id GROUP BY d.domain_name

datasets.name: owner_table_scores
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, d.domain_name, s.schema_name, ts.overall_score, ts.completeness_score, ts.accuracy_score, ts.validity_score, ts.consistency_score, ts.uniqueness_score, ts.timeliness_score, ts.rules_failed, ts.egregious_count, ts.effective_threshold_min, CASE WHEN ts.overall_score < ts.effective_threshold_min THEN 'Below Threshold' WHEN ts.overall_score < ts.effective_threshold_warning THEN 'Warning' ELSE 'Healthy' END AS status_band, bo.owner_name FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.schema s ON ts.schema_id = s.schema_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON ts.domain_id = d.domain_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id ORDER BY ts.overall_score ASC

datasets.name: owner_scores
queryLines: SELECT bo.owner_name, ROUND(AVG(ts.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score, COUNT(*) AS table_count, SUM(ts.rules_failed) AS total_failures FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id GROUP BY bo.owner_name ORDER BY overall_score ASC

datasets.name: owner_below_threshold
queryLines: SELECT bo.owner_name, t.table_name, d.domain_name, ts.overall_score, ts.rules_failed FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON ts.domain_id = d.domain_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id WHERE ts.overall_score < ts.effective_threshold_min ORDER BY ts.overall_score ASC

datasets.name: owner_top_failing_cols
queryLines: SELECT bo.owner_name, dc.column_name, t.table_name, qd.dimension_name, crr.weighted_score, crr.failure_rate, crr.passed FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON t.owner_id = bo.owner_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id WHERE NOT crr.passed ORDER BY crr.weighted_score ASC LIMIT 50

datasets.name: catalog_scores
queryLines: SELECT cs.catalog_name, ROUND(AVG(ts.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score, SUM(CASE WHEN ts.overall_score < ts.effective_threshold_min THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS tables_below_threshold FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name ORDER BY overall_score ASC

datasets.name: schema_scores
queryLines: SELECT cs.catalog_name, s.schema_name, ROUND(AVG(ts.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(ts.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.schema s ON ts.schema_id = s.schema_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name, s.schema_name ORDER BY overall_score ASC

datasets.name: catalog_table_grid
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, s.schema_name, cs.catalog_name, t.is_critical, ts.overall_score, ts.completeness_score, ts.accuracy_score, ts.validity_score, ts.consistency_score, ts.uniqueness_score, ts.timeliness_score, ts.rules_failed FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.schema s ON ts.schema_id = s.schema_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id ORDER BY ts.overall_score ASC

datasets.name: catalog_dim_failures
queryLines: SELECT ts.schema_name, ts.table_name, qd.dimension_name, COUNT(*) AS total_rules, SUM(CASE WHEN NOT crr.passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed_rules, ROUND(AVG(crr.weighted_score),2) AS avg_score, SUM(CASE WHEN crr.egregious_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS egregious_count FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts ON dc.table_id = ts.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id GROUP BY ts.schema_name, ts.table_name, qd.dimension_name

datasets.name: completeness_failures
queryLines: SELECT dc.column_name, t.table_name, crr.failure_rate, crr.failed_records, crr.total_records, crr.weighted_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id WHERE qd.dimension_name = 'Completeness' AND NOT crr.passed ORDER BY crr.weighted_score ASC

datasets.name: validity_failures
queryLines: SELECT dc.column_name, t.table_name, dr.rule_type, crr.failed_records, crr.failure_rate, crr.executed_rule_sql, crr.weighted_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id WHERE qd.dimension_name = 'Validity' AND NOT crr.passed ORDER BY crr.weighted_score ASC

datasets.name: uniqueness_failures_keys
queryLines: SELECT dc.column_name, t.table_name, crr.failure_rate, crr.weighted_score, dc.is_primary_key, dc.is_foreign_key FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id WHERE qd.dimension_name = 'Uniqueness' AND NOT crr.passed AND (dc.is_primary_key = true OR dc.is_foreign_key = true) ORDER BY crr.weighted_score ASC

datasets.name: table_col_rule_detail
queryLines: SELECT dc.column_name, dc.data_type, dc.is_primary_key, dc.is_foreign_key, qd.dimension_name, dr.rule_name, dr.rule_type, cra.threshold_value, crr.passed, crr.total_records, crr.failed_records, crr.failure_rate, crr.raw_score, crr.weighted_score, crr.egregious_flag, crr.executed_rule_sql, crr.result_detail, crr.evaluated_at, t.table_name FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id ORDER BY crr.weighted_score ASC

datasets.name: table_trend
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, r.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(crr.weighted_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Completeness' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Accuracy' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Validity' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Consistency' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Uniqueness' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Timeliness' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_run r ON crr.run_id = r.run_id GROUP BY t.table_name, r.run_timestamp ORDER BY r.run_timestamp

datasets.name: table_scores_all
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, ts.overall_score, ts.completeness_score, ts.accuracy_score, ts.validity_score, ts.consistency_score, ts.uniqueness_score, ts.timeliness_score, t.is_critical, ts.effective_threshold_min, ts.effective_threshold_warning FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id ORDER BY ts.overall_score ASC

datasets.name: rule_library
queryLines: SELECT dr.rule_id, dr.rule_name, dr.rule_description, dr.rule_type, dr.rule_status, dr.version, dr.is_system_rule, dr.default_severity_weight, dr.created_by, dr.rule_sql, qd.dimension_name, rc.category_name, COUNT(cra.assignment_id) AS times_deployed, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN crr.run_id IS NOT NULL THEN crr.failure_rate END),4) AS avg_failure_rate FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule_category rc ON dr.category_id = rc.category_id LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON dr.rule_id = cra.rule_id LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr ON cra.assignment_id = crr.assignment_id GROUP BY dr.rule_id, dr.rule_name, dr.rule_description, dr.rule_type, dr.rule_status, dr.version, dr.is_system_rule, dr.default_severity_weight, dr.created_by, dr.rule_sql, qd.dimension_name, rc.category_name ORDER BY times_deployed DESC

datasets.name: rules_by_category
queryLines: SELECT rc.category_name, qd.dimension_name, COUNT(*) AS rule_count FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule_category rc ON dr.category_id = rc.category_id GROUP BY rc.category_name, qd.dimension_name ORDER BY rule_count DESC

datasets.name: rules_by_dimension
queryLines: SELECT qd.dimension_name, COUNT(*) AS rule_count FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id GROUP BY qd.dimension_name

datasets.name: rules_highest_failure
queryLines: SELECT dr.rule_name, ROUND(AVG(crr.failure_rate),4) AS avg_failure_rate, COUNT(*) AS assignments FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id GROUP BY dr.rule_name ORDER BY avg_failure_rate DESC LIMIT 10

datasets.name: unmonitored_tables
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, s.schema_name, cs.catalog_name, bo.owner_name FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.schema s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON s.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON t.owner_id = bo.owner_id LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON t.table_id = dc.table_id LEFT JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON dc.column_id = cra.column_id WHERE cra.assignment_id IS NULL

datasets.name: org_dim_scores
queryLines: SELECT 'Completeness' AS dimension, completeness_score AS score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest UNION ALL SELECT 'Accuracy', accuracy_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest UNION ALL SELECT 'Validity', validity_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest UNION ALL SELECT 'Consistency', consistency_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest UNION ALL SELECT 'Uniqueness', uniqueness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest UNION ALL SELECT 'Timeliness', timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_org_score_latest

datasets.name: org_trend_unpivot
queryLines: SELECT run_timestamp, 'Overall' AS dimension, overall_score AS score FROM (SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp) UNION ALL SELECT run_timestamp, 'Completeness', completeness_score FROM (SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp) UNION ALL SELECT run_timestamp, 'Accuracy', accuracy_score FROM (SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp) UNION ALL SELECT run_timestamp, 'Validity', validity_score FROM (SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp) UNION ALL SELECT run_timestamp, 'Consistency', consistency_score FROM (SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp) UNION ALL SELECT run_timestamp, 'Uniqueness', uniqueness_score FROM (SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp) UNION ALL SELECT run_timestamp, 'Timeliness', timeliness_score FROM (SELECT dst.run_timestamp, ROUND(AVG(dst.overall_score),2) AS overall_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.completeness_score),2) AS completeness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.accuracy_score),2) AS accuracy_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.validity_score),2) AS validity_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.consistency_score),2) AS consistency_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.uniqueness_score),2) AS uniqueness_score, ROUND(AVG(dst.timeliness_score),2) AS timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst GROUP BY dst.run_timestamp ORDER BY dst.run_timestamp)

datasets.name: domain_passfail_unpivot
queryLines: SELECT d.domain_name, 'Passed' AS status, SUM(CASE WHEN crr.passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rule_count FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON t.domain_id = d.domain_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id GROUP BY d.domain_name UNION ALL SELECT d.domain_name, 'Failed' AS status, SUM(CASE WHEN NOT crr.passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rule_count FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON t.domain_id = d.domain_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id GROUP BY d.domain_name

datasets.name: domain_trend_unpivot
queryLines: SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, 'Overall' AS dimension, dst.overall_score AS score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id UNION ALL SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, 'Completeness', dst.completeness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id UNION ALL SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, 'Accuracy', dst.accuracy_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id UNION ALL SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, 'Validity', dst.validity_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id UNION ALL SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, 'Consistency', dst.consistency_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id UNION ALL SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, 'Uniqueness', dst.uniqueness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id UNION ALL SELECT d.domain_name, dst.run_timestamp, 'Timeliness', dst.timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_domain_score_trend dst JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.data_domain d ON dst.domain_id = d.domain_id

datasets.name: owner_dim_scores
queryLines: SELECT bo.owner_name, 'Completeness' AS dimension, ROUND(AVG(ts.completeness_score),2) AS score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id GROUP BY bo.owner_name UNION ALL SELECT bo.owner_name, 'Accuracy', ROUND(AVG(ts.accuracy_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id GROUP BY bo.owner_name UNION ALL SELECT bo.owner_name, 'Validity', ROUND(AVG(ts.validity_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id GROUP BY bo.owner_name UNION ALL SELECT bo.owner_name, 'Consistency', ROUND(AVG(ts.consistency_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id GROUP BY bo.owner_name UNION ALL SELECT bo.owner_name, 'Uniqueness', ROUND(AVG(ts.uniqueness_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id GROUP BY bo.owner_name UNION ALL SELECT bo.owner_name, 'Timeliness', ROUND(AVG(ts.timeliness_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.business_owner bo ON ts.owner_id = bo.owner_id GROUP BY bo.owner_name

datasets.name: catalog_dim_unpivot
queryLines: SELECT cs.catalog_name, 'Completeness' AS dimension, ROUND(AVG(ts.completeness_score),2) AS score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name UNION ALL SELECT cs.catalog_name, 'Accuracy', ROUND(AVG(ts.accuracy_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name UNION ALL SELECT cs.catalog_name, 'Validity', ROUND(AVG(ts.validity_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name UNION ALL SELECT cs.catalog_name, 'Consistency', ROUND(AVG(ts.consistency_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name UNION ALL SELECT cs.catalog_name, 'Uniqueness', ROUND(AVG(ts.uniqueness_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name UNION ALL SELECT cs.catalog_name, 'Timeliness', ROUND(AVG(ts.timeliness_score),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.catalog cs ON ts.catalog_id = cs.catalog_id GROUP BY cs.catalog_name

datasets.name: table_dim_unpivot
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, 'Completeness' AS dimension, ts.completeness_score AS score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id UNION ALL SELECT t.table_name, 'Accuracy', ts.accuracy_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id UNION ALL SELECT t.table_name, 'Validity', ts.validity_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id UNION ALL SELECT t.table_name, 'Consistency', ts.consistency_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id UNION ALL SELECT t.table_name, 'Uniqueness', ts.uniqueness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id UNION ALL SELECT t.table_name, 'Timeliness', ts.timeliness_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_table_scores_latest ts JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON ts.table_id = t.table_id

datasets.name: table_trend_unpivot
queryLines: SELECT t.table_name, r.run_timestamp, 'Overall' AS dimension, ROUND(AVG(crr.weighted_score),2) AS score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_run r ON crr.run_id = r.run_id GROUP BY t.table_name, r.run_timestamp UNION ALL SELECT t.table_name, r.run_timestamp, 'Completeness', ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Completeness' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_run r ON crr.run_id = r.run_id GROUP BY t.table_name, r.run_timestamp UNION ALL SELECT t.table_name, r.run_timestamp, 'Accuracy', ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN qd.dimension_name='Accuracy' THEN crr.weighted_score END),2) FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_rule dr ON cra.rule_id = dr.rule_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.quality_dimension qd ON dr.dimension_id = qd.dimension_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_run r ON crr.run_id = r.run_id GROUP BY t.table_name, r.run_timestamp

datasets.name: worst_columns
queryLines: SELECT dc.column_name, t.table_name, MIN(crr.weighted_score) AS min_score FROM serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_result crr JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.column_rule_assignment cra ON crr.assignment_id = cra.assignment_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_column dc ON cra.column_id = dc.column_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.dq_table t ON dc.table_id = t.table_id JOIN serverless_stable_jc9zgx_catalog.data_quality.v_latest_run lr ON crr.run_id = lr.latest_run_id GROUP BY dc.column_name, t.table_name ORDER BY min_score ASC LIMIT 10
